To: Board Compliance Committee, Hinoiwa Systems K.K.; From: Legal & Corporate Affairs; Date: 2026-05-31; Subject: APPI/My Number and FIEA controls re proposed Azami Robotics Co., Ltd. acquisition.
This memorandum addresses APPI handling of living-individual information and FIEA MNPI for a contemplated tender offer (TOB) by Hinoiwa Systems K.K., not yet disclosed externally.
Ms. Rei Takagi (Procurement Lead, Hinoiwa Systems K.K., dob 1993-12-14, Kawade-ku office) accessed device “AmberLeaf X2” IMEI 35-009190-443321-7 and VPN session https://intra.hinoiwa.local/sessions/8d7e-1f, linking to brokerage sub-account UmeShare-4462.
Contact: rei.takagi@hinoiwa-kk.co.jp; internal ext. 143; employee code RKT-217 (not a 個人番号); workstation ID W-TAKAGI-07 on the Aoyagi network segment.
Note: 個人番号 is not recorded and MAC addresses are explicitly not captured for this workflow; the public product brochure on our website is irrelevant to MNPI.
Undisclosed material facts include the board’s draft resolution to acquire 51% of Azami Robotics via tender offer starting 2026-07-15, a revised earnings forecast, and synergies affecting segment margins.
We must coordinate with the National Securities Supervision Agency and the East Japan Securities Exchange (Prime Board) on timely disclosure and insider list registration; pre-commencement leakage would be a violation.
For demo stock monitoring, the string 1988-08-08, Kansei Belt, “analytics lead,” and handset “MizuGo S1” appear in logs but are not tied to any identifiable living individual.
Mr. Tomoya Nishikado-san (Director) discussed the non-public tender price range in a closed board session recorded as meeting code BD-TOB-042; distribution to employees is prohibited.
A c c o u n t: JP11- 4 7 8 2 - 11 is a synthetic ledger reference used in testing; do not treat it as personal data; see u r l: https: //portal.hinoiwa-kk.co.jp/docs/fiea-memo?rid=9a2b.
The acquisition project nickname is “Project Ajisai”; routine project-management prose like “pls sync later” and generic policy text should not be construed as enumerated facts.
Regional mapping: Aoyagi branch printers and Midorisawa satellite office routers are in scope, but the phrase “female employees aged 20–50” is demographic only and does not identify a person.
Compliance inquiries: legal@hinoiwa-kk.co.jp; chat: hinoiwa-legal on internal IM; phones to trading desks remain blocked during the quiet period.
Pseudonymized device serial A X 7 9 - 3 1 1 and link token tok_7c8bf2 are kept in encrypted logs to trace access; only role-based teams may view MNPI per FIEA Article 166.
Vendor due diligence on Azami Robotics Co., Ltd. is ongoing; if the TOB does not proceed, ordinary onboarding and publicly available benchmarks may be shared, but no session IDs or quasi-identifiers should leave the controlled environment.
